Title: Complete loan application flow with approval
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in, has valid JWT token
Steps: 1. GET /api/loan/landing to view landing page | 2. POST /api/loan/customer-details with valid customer information | 3. Verify response triggers income form | 4. POST /api/loan/income-details with qualifying income | 5. Verify loan decision response
Test Data: Customer Details: {dateOfBirth: "1990-01-15", fatherName: "John Doe Sr", address: {street: "123 Main St", city: "Boston", state: "MA", zipCode: "02101", country: "USA"}} | Income Details: {employmentType: "employed", employer: "Tech Corp", monthlyIncome: 5000, additionalIncome: 500, yearsEmployed: 3}
Expected Result: Landing page returns branding data, customer details saved with status 'customer_details_submitted', income form triggered, income details saved with status 'approved', loan decision shows approved with amount up to $50000

Title: User registers and completes full loan application journey
Preconditions: No existing user account
Steps: 1. POST /api/auth/register to create new account | 2. Receive JWT token | 3. GET /api/loan/landing | 4. POST /api/loan/customer-details | 5. POST /api/loan/income-details | 6. GET /api/loan/application-status to verify final status
Test Data: Register: {name: "Jane Smith", email: "jane@example.com", password: "password123"} | Customer Details: DOB 1985-05-20, father "Robert Smith", complete address | Income: employed, $6000/month, 5 years experience
Expected Result: User created successfully, receives token, completes all forms in sequence, application status shows 'approved' or 'income_details_submitted', all data persisted in User model

Title: Submit income details without completing customer details first
Preconditions: User logged in but customerDetailsCompleted is false
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details directly without submitting customer details first
Expected Result: API returns 400 Bad Request with message 'Please complete customer details first' and nextStep pointing to /api/loan/customer-details

Title: Minimum qualifying income and employment duration
Preconditions: User has completed customer details, submitting income at exact minimum thresholds
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with monthlyIncome exactly 3000 and yearsEmployed exactly 1
Test Data: employmentType: "employed", employer: "Small Co", monthlyIncome: 3000, additionalIncome: 0, yearsEmployed: 1
Expected Result: Loan decision returns approved: true with appropriate loan amount calculation (totalIncome * 10 capped at 50000)

Title: Income just below minimum threshold
Preconditions: User has completed customer details, income slightly below minimum
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with monthlyIncome 2999
Test Data: employmentType: "employed", employer: "Startup Inc", monthlyIncome: 2999, additionalIncome: 0, yearsEmployed: 2
Expected Result: Loan decision returns approved: false, message indicates under review, reason states 'Income below minimum requirement', status set to 'under_review'

Title: Employment duration below minimum threshold
Preconditions: User has completed customer details, sufficient income but insufficient employment duration
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with yearsEmployed 0.5
Test Data: employmentType: "employed", employer: "New Job LLC", monthlyIncome: 5000, additionalIncome: 0, yearsEmployed: 0.5
Expected Result: Loan decision returns approved: false, reason states 'Employment duration below minimum requirement', status 'under_review'

Title: Self-employed applicant with additional income
Preconditions: User logged in, customer details completed
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with employmentType 'self-employed' and both monthlyIncome and additionalIncome
Test Data: employmentType: "self-employed", employer: "Freelance Consulting", monthlyIncome: 4000, additionalIncome: 1500, yearsEmployed: 2
Expected Result: Total income calculated as 5500, loan decision approved with approvedAmount min(5500*10, 50000) = 50000, status 'approved'

Title: Check application status after customer details submission
Preconditions: User has submitted customer details but not income details
Steps: 1. GET /api/loan/application-status after submitting customer details only
Expected Result: Response shows loanApplicationStatus: 'customer_details_submitted', customerDetailsCompleted: true, incomeDetailsCompleted: false, nextStep points to /api/loan/income-details

Title: Landing page returns Oktawave branding
Preconditions: No preconditions, public endpoint
Steps: 1. GET /api/loan/landing
Expected Result: Response includes title 'Oktawave Loan Origination System', branding object with primaryColor '#2DB5DA', secondaryColor '#939598', typography Proxima Nova and Montserrat, callToAction pointing to customer-details endpoint

Title: Submit customer details with missing required fields
Preconditions: User logged in with valid token
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/customer-details with missing dateOfBirth field
Test Data: Payload missing dateOfBirth: {fatherName: "Test Father", address: {street: "123 St", city: "Boston", state: "MA", zipCode: "02101", country: "USA"}}
Expected Result: API returns 422 Unprocessable Entity with validation errors array indicating 'Date of birth is required'

Title: Submit customer details with invalid date format
Preconditions: User logged in with valid token
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/customer-details with dateOfBirth in wrong format
Expected Result: API returns 422 with error 'Valid date is required'

Title: Submit customer details with invalid zip code format
Preconditions: User logged in with valid token
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/customer-details with malformed zipCode
Expected Result: API returns 422 with error 'Valid zip code is required'

Title: Submit income details with invalid employment type
Preconditions: User logged in, customer details completed
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with employmentType not in enum
Expected Result: API returns 422 with error 'Valid employment type is required'

Title: Submit income details with negative monthly income
Preconditions: User logged in, customer details completed
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with negative monthlyIncome
Expected Result: API returns 422 with error 'Monthly income must be a positive number'

Title: Submit income details without authentication
Preconditions: User not logged in, no JWT token
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details without Authorization header
Expected Result: API returns 401 Unauthorized (auth middleware blocks request)

Title: Submit customer details without authentication
Preconditions: User not logged in, no JWT token
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/customer-details without Authorization header
Expected Result: API returns 401 Unauthorized (auth middleware blocks request)

Title: Missing employer for employed user
Preconditions: User logged in, customer details completed, employmentType requires employer
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with employmentType 'employed' but no employer
Expected Result: API returns 422 with error 'Employer is required for employed/self-employed'

Title: Retired user without employer field
Preconditions: User logged in, customer details completed
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with employmentType 'retired' and no employer
Test Data: employmentType: "retired", monthlyIncome: 3500, additionalIncome: 500, yearsEmployed: 0 (optional for retired)
Expected Result: Income details saved successfully, employer field empty or not required for validation, loan decision based on income alone

Title: Maximum loan amount capping
Preconditions: User has extremely high income triggering cap
Steps: 1. POST /api/loan/income-details with very high monthly income
Test Data: monthlyIncome: 10000, additionalIncome: 5000, employmentType: "employed", employer: "Big Corp", yearsEmployed: 5
Expected Result: Loan approved with approvedAmount capped at 50000 despite totalIncome * 10 = 150000, demonstrating max loan cap logic

Title: Check application status before any submission
Preconditions: User just registered, no forms submitted
Steps: 1. GET /api/loan/application-status immediately after registration
Expected Result: Response shows loanApplicationStatus: 'not_started', both customerDetailsCompleted and incomeDetailsCompleted are false, nextStep directs to /api/loan/customer-details
